title: OP-Mod by Limo4317
description: This mod is about getting overpowered items more easily than normal, but not too easy.
body:
# Welcome to the OP-Mod

**This mod is about getting overpowered items more easily than normal, but not too easy.**   

It is my first mod and therefore **may contain bugs, errors or similar**.
The whole concept of the mod is based on a villager-like creature called ‘OP-Dropper’.
The story of the mod is regulated via Advancements.
Don't be surprised about the OP-Dropper texture, this is intentional.

I made this mod with **[MCreator](https://mcreator.net/)!**

**Report Issues and tell ideas on my [Discord](https://discord.gg/mZD8FnCJNc)!**

**These mods could be helpful when playing my mod:**    
**1. [JEI](https://modrinth.com/mod/jei)**    
**2. [Jade]([https://modrinth.com/mod/wthit](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade))**
